options.name: progression_balancing
options.description:
A system that can move progression earlier, to try and prevent the player from getting stuck and bored early.

A lower setting means more getting stuck. A higher setting means less getting stuck.

options.name: accessibility
options.description:
Set rules for reachability of your items/locations.

**Full:** ensure everything can be reached and acquired.

**Minimal:** ensure what is needed to reach your goal can be acquired.

options.name: death_link_trigger
options.description:
Chooses what local Trials death condition sends a DeathLink.

Full Party Wipe: Sends when every active party member is dead or downed.
Any Party Kill: Sends when any active party member fully dies.
Any Party Downed: Sends when any active party member is downed.

options.name: death_link_punishment
options.description:
Chooses what happens locally when this slot receives a DeathLink.

Kill All Party Members: Wipes the active party, companions, and summons to force a reload.
Down Random Party Member: Downs one random active party member or companion.
Kill Random Party Member: Fully kills one random active party member or companion.
Remove All Resources - All: Drains every tracked resource from the whole active party and companions,
including spell slots, actions, bonus actions, movement, rage charges, Channel Divinity, sorcery points,
and similar class resources.
Remove All Resources - Random: Drains every tracked resource from one random active party member or companion,
including spell slots, actions, bonus actions, movement, rage charges, Channel Divinity, sorcery points,
and similar class resources.
Remove All Actions - All: Removes only actions, bonus actions, and movement from the whole active party and companions.
Remove All Actions - Random: Removes only actions, bonus actions, and movement from one random active
party member or companion.
Nothing: Receives the DeathLink notification but applies no local punishment.

options.name: goal
options.description:
Determines how this BG3 Trials slot wins.

Buy NG+: Purchase the local Quick Start / NG+ unlock from the tav shop.
Clear Stages: Complete the configured number of Trials clears.
Reach RogueScore: Reach the configured RogueScore total.

options.name: goal_clear_target
options.description: How many successful Trials clears are required when the goal is Clear Stages.

options.name: goal_rogue_score_target
options.description: How much RogueScore is required when the goal is Reach RogueScore.

options.name: goal_ng_plus_fragment_gate_percent
options.description:
How much of the Progressive Shop must be unlocked before `NG+` appears in the shop.

If Progressive Shop is disabled, this gate is ignored and `NG+` appears normally.

options.name: goal_ng_plus_price
options.description: Local shop price for `NG+`.

options.name: clear_check_count
options.description: How many Archipelago checks can be earned from successful scenario clears.

options.name: clear_check_interval
options.description: Awards one clear-based check every N successful scenario clears until the count limit is reached.

options.name: kill_check_count
options.description: How many Archipelago checks can be earned from total enemy kills in Trials.

options.name: kill_check_interval
options.description: Awards one kill-based check every N total kills until the count limit is reached.

options.name: perfect_check_count
options.description: How many Archipelago checks can be earned from perfect clears.

options.name: perfect_check_interval
options.description: Awards one perfect-clear check every N perfect clears until the count limit is reached.

options.name: roguescore_check_count
options.description: How many Archipelago checks can be earned from RogueScore milestones.

options.name: roguescore_check_interval
options.description: Awards one RogueScore-based check every N RogueScore until the count limit is reached.

options.name: progressive_shop
options.description:
Locks randomized AP shop checks behind progressive ``Shop Fragment`` items.

Each received Shop Fragment unlocks the next visible section of the tav shop until the
whole randomized shop is available.

options.name: progressive_shop_unlock_rate
options.description:
How much of the randomized AP shop each received Shop Fragment unlocks.

Lower values create more Shop Fragments and finer-grained shop progression.
This option only affects generation when Progressive Shop is enabled.

options.name: shop_check_count
options.description:
Targets at least N randomized AP shop checks from ``trials_unlock_catalog.json``.

Buying one of these entries sends a location check instead of granting the reward immediately.
The original reward becomes an AP item that must be received from the multiworld.

The world will automatically expand above this value when needed so every configured
non-filler unlock copy still appears somewhere in the randomized item pool.

options.name: shop_price_minimum
options.description:
Minimum seeded random price for AP shop entries.

Prices are rounded to multiples of 10, and NG+ keeps its vanilla local cost.

options.name: shop_price_maximum
options.description:
Maximum seeded random price for AP shop entries.

Prices are rounded to multiples of 10, and NG+ keeps its vanilla local cost.

options.name: vanilla_pixie_blessing_in_shop
options.description:
Restores Pixie Blessing as a normal local shop unlock instead of randomizing it into the AP pool.

When enabled, Moonshield is removed from the randomized shop check pool and the vanilla 30-cost shop entry stays local.

options.name: permanent_buff_target
options.description:
Chooses who receives character-bound useful AP unlock rewards.

User Character: Gives the reward to the receiving player's chosen character.
Random Party Member: Gives the reward to one random active party member.
All Party Members: Gives the reward to every active party member.

Progression rewards ignore this setting and still keep their whole-party or global behavior.

options.name: tadpole_copies
options.description:
How many copies of Get a Tadpole are included in the randomized AP unlock pool.

Set this to 0 to remove that unlock from the multiworld.

options.name: buy_exp_copies
options.description:
How many copies of 1000 EXP are included in the randomized AP unlock pool.

Set this to 0 to remove that unlock from the multiworld.

options.name: buy_loot_copies
options.description:
How many copies of Roll Loot x10 are included in the randomized AP unlock pool.

Set this to 0 to remove that unlock from the multiworld.

options.name: buy_loot_rare_copies
options.description:
How many copies of Roll Rare Loot x5 are included in the randomized AP unlock pool.

Set this to 0 to remove that unlock from the multiworld.

options.name: buy_loot_epic_copies
options.description:
How many copies of Roll Epic Loot x3 are included in the randomized AP unlock pool.

Set this to 0 to remove that unlock from the multiworld.

options.name: buy_loot_legendary_copies
options.description:
How many copies of Roll Legendary Loot x1 are included in the randomized AP unlock pool.

Set this to 0 to remove that unlock from the multiworld.

options.name: buy_supplies_copies
options.description:
How many copies of 40 Camp Supplies are included in the randomized AP unlock pool.

Set this to 0 to remove that unlock from the multiworld.

options.name: buy_hair_str_copies
options.description:
How many copies of Hag Hair Strength +1 are included in the randomized AP unlock pool.

Set this to 0 to remove that unlock from the multiworld.

options.name: buy_hair_dex_copies
options.description:
How many copies of Hag Hair Dexterity +1 are included in the randomized AP unlock pool.

Set this to 0 to remove that unlock from the multiworld.

options.name: buy_hair_con_copies
options.description:
How many copies of Hag Hair Constitution +1 are included in the randomized AP unlock pool.

Set this to 0 to remove that unlock from the multiworld.

options.name: buy_hair_int_copies
options.description:
How many copies of Hag Hair Intelligence +1 are included in the randomized AP unlock pool.

Set this to 0 to remove that unlock from the multiworld.

options.name: buy_hair_wis_copies
options.description:
How many copies of Hag Hair Wisdom +1 are included in the randomized AP unlock pool.

Set this to 0 to remove that unlock from the multiworld.

options.name: buy_hair_cha_copies
options.description:
How many copies of Hag Hair Charisma +1 are included in the randomized AP unlock pool.

Set this to 0 to remove that unlock from the multiworld.

options.name: include_equipment_fillers
options.description:
Whether one-off equipment filler items from the upstream BG3 equipment pool stay in the AP filler pool.

Disable this to remove those equipment filler items from the multiworld entirely.

options.name: traps_percentage
options.description: Percent chance that filler slots become traps instead of helpful filler rewards.

options.name: enabled_traps
options.description:
Which trap types are allowed in the filler pool.

Monster traps are still the least proven option and may need extra testing in Trials.

options.name: local_items
options.description: Forces these items to be in their native world.
options: Garb of the Land and Sky
Servitor of the Black Hand Gloves
Silver Sword of the Astral Plane

options.name: non_local_items
options.description: Forces these items to be outside their native world.
options: Garb of the Land and Sky
Servitor of the Black Hand Gloves
Silver Sword of the Astral Plane

options.name: start_inventory
options.description: Start with the specified amount of these items. Example: "Bomb: 1"
options: Garb of the Land and Sky
Servitor of the Black Hand Gloves
Silver Sword of the Astral Plane

options.name: start_hints
options.description: Start with these item's locations prefilled into the ``!hint`` command.
options: Garb of the Land and Sky
Servitor of the Black Hand Gloves
Silver Sword of the Astral Plane

options.name: start_location_hints
options.description: Start with these locations and their item prefilled into the ``!hint`` command.

options.name: exclude_locations
options.description: Prevent these locations from having an important item.

options.name: priority_locations
options.description: Prevent these locations from having an unimportant item.

options.name: item_links
options.description: Share part of your item pool with other players.

options.name: plando_items
options.description: Generic items plando.
